items.name: Golden Top Hat of Bling Bling
items.description: For those times when a plain old top hat made out of solid gold just won't do.

items.name: Inaugural Top Hat
items.description: Uncle Sam's on the move!

items.name: Friday the 13th Top Hat
items.description: Bringing the Friday the 13th vibes.

items.name: Neon Pink Top Hat
items.description: Fashion forward or fashion fast-forward?

items.name: Blue Banded Top Hat
items.description: I figured after two years it was time to revive this classic - which was actually the first ROBLOX hat ever.

items.name: Rbadam's Smokestack Top Hat
items.description: You'll look smokin' in this classy top hat. Almost as classy as Rbadam. Almost.  *Note This hat is literally smokin' and may (if by may you mean almost certainly) contain traces of smoke particles.

items.name: Scare Mayor Top Hat
items.description: I'm the Mayor of Scare Town... and you are about to be frightened.

items.name: Tasteless Top Hat
items.description: There's no accounting for taste!

items.name: BIG: Purple Banded Top Hat
items.description: This hat only fits the Bighead. It does not fit regular heads. This BIG dapper accouterment is a symbol of wealth, prestige, and honor. Perfect for Victorian Balls and award ceremonies.

items.name: 2010 New Year's Top Hat
items.description: Keep your new year classy with this snazzy cardboard top hat.

items.name: Roblox Rally 2011 Top Hat
items.description: This classy top hat will be given to every player who attended the ROBLOX Rally 2011 event in San Francisco on August 1, 2011.

items.name: Halloween 2012 Top Hat
items.description: Happy Halloween!

items.name: Crimson Catseye Top Hat
items.description: A young ambitious haberdasher acquired the Crimson Catseye from Haunted Hill on a crazy dare. He then became known as Catseye Speaker and created these hats to commemorate that night.

items.name: Wicked Top Hat
items.description: So let me answer the question I'm sure you all must have: Why WOULDN'T you want to wear a possessed top hat on your head?

items.name: Virtual BLOXcon Top Hat
items.description: Stay classy, BLOXcon!

items.name: Busted Top Hat
items.description: The initials on the inside of the rim say ZM.

items.name: King of the Dark Crop
items.description: A sinister king, grown from the darkest seeds...

items.name: Brain Power Top Hat
items.description: This hat literally makes you smarter!  Also twice as attractive to zombies.... but your extra brain power will help you get out of that mess!

items.name: Mr. Fancy Top Hat
items.description: So fancy that even his top hat's top hat has a top hat.

items.name: Awkward Locator Top Hat
items.description: You know how sometimes just saying something is awkward, makes it even more awkward? Be the guy that makes that happen with this hat. For you, everyday is National Awkward Moments Day!

items.name: Psychedelic Top Hat
items.description: We think with our minds, they think with their heads

items.name: 2011 New Year's Top Hat
items.description: Stay classy 2011!

items.name: Princess Top Hat
items.description: Because crowns and tiaras aren't fit for every occasion...

items.name: Robber Baron Top Hat
items.description: With this top hat, you'll be the shooting image of Leland Stanford.

items.name: Copper Steampunk Top Hat
items.description: Perfect for a night out in a Victorian town or perhaps a morning steamship excursion.

items.name: Bright Star Top Hat
items.description: The only star you want to wish on.

items.name: Zeppelin Top Hat
items.description: It's hard for zeppelin enthusiast to find an appropriate hat. As zeppelin enthusiasts ourselves, we know this. We present you with the Zeppelin Top Hat - because you deserve a hat that reflects your lifestyle.

items.name: Steampunk Sweetheart Top Hat
items.description: A machine cannot love.  But I sure love this hat!

items.name: Brass Top Hat
items.description: Because Gold is a bit too ostentatious.

items.name: Recycled Cardboard Top Hat
items.description: I'm not sure they'll let you in the country club wearing this.
